entries.definition: A PCIe extended capability that provides enhanced reporting, logging, and handling for correctable, non-fatal, and fatal errors.

aliases: Link Training and Status State Machine
entries.chinese: 链路训练与状态状态机
entries.definition: The PCIe state machine that controls link detection, training, configuration, recovery, and power-management transitions.
A packet used by the PCIe Data Link Layer for link management functions such as acknowledgements, flow control, and power management.
